assignment: Independently replay and challenge the generic Lite structured-cancellation conclusion and its complete v2 checkpoint.
required_checks: Run the saved v2 replay and verify all hashes and executable checkpoint fields.
Independently probe scalar child, scalar error, stream normal completion, producer error, consumer break, parent close, and three-level nested close.
Challenge whether optional caller signal plus ExecutionContext.signal covers every real caller without a public cancel method.
Challenge abort descendants, return active stream iterators, join descendants, classify signal exits, then clean resources as the correct order.
Check sibling isolation, parent isolation, unhandled rejections, uncooperative scalar behavior, and original-error preservation.
Inspect whether the proposal is generic Lite behavior rather than session semantics and whether private bookkeeping can remain private.
Audit every active wall and run store verification after governed output.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
Self-certification, public cancel, start, spawn, task handles, worker pools, session-specific Lite semantics, or wall weakening
required_outputs: workers/validator-dkr-2/progress.jsonl via the absolute OKRA store helper worker-report command
terminal_condition: Finish with explicit behavior, API, ordering, and wall dispositions plus a governed progress record.
